title: Clever LMS Connect - Gradebook Sync Beginner's Guide
heading: Teacher
parentHeadings: Clever LMS Connect - Gradebook Sync Beginner's Guide
content:
#### Teacher

You can confirm the creation of your assignment by logging in to Schoology as a demo teacher. Please reach out to [\[email protected\]](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#8ce5e2f8e9ebfeedf8e5e3e2ffccefe0e9fae9fea2efe3e1) to request end-user credentials for testing.

![Description of the image](https://files.readme.io/2e75de01a192ae8edbe2ddf3a15b9951d1e04ca4a9670ac05ad1afb1609c621a-image.png)  
_Creating the assignment from the teacher view_

![Description of the image](https://files.readme.io/0db1b955be5b841d1fec2bca21d9454bebb4de74612fa484bd6ce9af0af6d4a6-image.png)  
_After updating the assignment from the teacher view_
